---
title: "Admir C. de O. Junior, M.Sc."
subtitle: "<span style='display: block; text-align: center;'>Ecologist | Data Scientist</span>"
# subtitle: "<span style='display: block; text-align: center;'>Ph.D. Researcher at Bothanical Institute of Barcelona</span>"
image: images/profile1.png
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AdmirJr
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/admirjr/
    - icon: "{{< iconify simple-icon orcid >}}"
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1946-0475
    - icon: lattes
      text: Lattes
      href: http://lattes.cnpq.br/8356147861311035
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:admircjunior@gmail.com
---

Hello, nice to meet you! 

I’m an ecologist and data scientist working primarily in computational and theoretical ecology. My skills range from programming and statistical analysis to data visualization.

This website serves as my portfolio. Here you will find information about me, my work, and some side projects.

Feel free to reach out!
